_meta.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 match results — auto-loaded as form/historical data for future predictions
_meta.source: ESPN, FIFA.com, Olympics.com, SBS News, CBS Sports, Yahoo Sports

matchday_status.round_of_32: IN PROGRESS (4/16 played — SA-CAN, ENG-COD, BEL-SEN (AET), USA-BIH — 12 unresolved/upcoming)

results.notes: Tournament opening match. First goal scored by Julián Quiñones in 9th minute.
Czech Republic scored first via header from Ladislav Krejcí. South Korea completed a comeback win.
Canada's first World Cup point on home soil. Substitute Cyle Larin scored equaliser in 78th minute.
Dominant USA win. Folarin Balogun scored twice, Christian Pulisic strong performance.
Qatar's first ever World Cup point. Dramatic late equaliser by Qatar.
Brazil held by strong Morocco defensive display. Saibari's sumptuous chip over Alisson was one of the best finishes of the first round.
Australia solid 2-0 win over Turkey.
Scotland win 1-0 vs Haiti.
Ivory Coast 1-0 win over Ecuador.
Germany emphatic 7-1 thrashing of Curaçao. Tournament statement performance.
Sweden dominant 5-1 win over Tunisia.
Netherlands held 2-2 by Japan despite being heavy favourites. Japan impressive.
All 4 Group G teams drew in matchday 1.
Iran 2-2 New Zealand. All Group G teams drew in matchday 1.
Surprise result. Spain held to 0-0 draw by Cabo Verde. Spain power rankings fell significantly.
Saudi Arabia and Uruguay share the points.
France strong 3-1 win. Mbappé and Griezmann leading the attack.
Norway dominant 4-1. Erling Haaland brace makes Group I very competitive with France.
Argentina impressive 3-0 win. Messi leads Argentina to power ranking #1 spot.
Austria 3-1 win sets up tasty Group J clash with Argentina.
Portugal stumble to a draw vs DR Congo. Portugal power rankings fell alongside Spain. National anthem shown before match.
Colombia dominant 3-1 win. Strong Group K opener for Colombia.
England beat Croatia 4-2 in a high-scoring Group L opener. Kane and Bellingham impressive.
Ghana narrow 1-0 win over Panama.
Both Czech Republic and South Africa share the points. Both still in contention.
Mexico defeat South Korea and become first team to qualify for the knockout stage. Mexico wins Group A.
Switzerland dominant 4-1 win over Bosnia.
Canada rout Qatar 6-0 on home soil. Emphatic statement win.
Brazil beat Haiti 3-0. Haiti become first team eliminated. Brazil advance.
Morocco 1-0 win over Scotland. Morocco advance alongside Brazil.
USA 2-0 win. First USA to win their group since 2010. Pulisic injury concern (calf, day-to-day).
Paraguay beat Turkey 1-0 to stay alive in Group D.
Germany confirm knockouts place. Ivory Coast led 1-0 via Kessié before sub Undav scored brace to steal late win in stoppage time. Dramatic finish.
Ecuador 0-0 Curaçao. Both teams still in the hunt for qualification. Tense goalless draw. Previous DB entry (0-1 Curaçao) was incorrect — corrected Jun 21.
Netherlands rout Sweden 5-1. Cody Gakpo brace. Netherlands seize control of Group F.
Belgium controlled the match. De Bruyne and Doku on the scoresheet.
Egypt came from behind to beat New Zealand 2-1. Salah and Elneny scored.
Spain bounced back from 0-0 vs Cabo Verde with convincing 2-0 win.
Cabo Verde major upset — beat Uruguay 1-0 to go top of Group H on goal difference. Garry Rodrigues the hero.
France professional win. Mbappé and Dembélé both on target.
Norway edge thriller 3-2. Haaland scored twice again. Both teams with 3 goals in 2 games.
Messi scores again as Argentina qualify. Historic moment — Messi now oldest WC scorer ever in consecutive games.
Algeria survive with narrow 1-0 win. Mahrez the difference-maker.
Portugal put Uzbekistan to the sword 3-0. Ronaldo penalty. Portugal back on track.
Colombia dominant again. Díaz and James on the scoresheet. Colombia top Group K.
England clinical 2-0 win. Kane and Bellingham both scoring. England already through.
Croatia ease past Panama 2-0. Modrić and Perisic goals.
Mexico finish Group A unbeaten. Jiménez leads the line. Czech Republic eliminated.
South Africa stun South Korea to qualify. Percy Tau the hero. South Korea eliminated despite entering MD3 in 2nd.
Switzerland claim Group B top spot. Canada finish 2nd despite late Larin goal.
Bosnia beat Qatar 3-1 to finish 3rd in Group B and qualify as one of the best 3rd-place teams. Dzeko impressive.
Brazil cruise. Vinicius hat-trick-ish performance with a goal and assist. Scotland eliminated.
Morocco clinical. Saibari continues brilliant tournament. Haiti exit winless.
UPSET! Turkey beat USA 3-2 despite USA already qualified. Pulisic fitness scare but played. Turkey eliminated — too little too late.
Goalless draw means Australia finish 2nd on GD. Paraguay qualify as 3rd-place team. Turkey eliminated.
Ivory Coast top 6pts. Curaçao eliminated.
MASSIVE UPSET! Ecuador beat Germany 2-1 in a historic result. Germany already qualified but still humbling. Ecuador qualify as 3rd-place team with 4 pts. Caicedo midfield masterclass.
Netherlands win comfortably. Gakpo scores again. Brobbey comes off the bench to add 3rd.
Japan and Sweden draw 1-1. Sweden qualify 2nd in Group F despite the draw. Japan out.
Belgium demolish New Zealand 5-1. De Bruyne brace. Belgium top Group G convincingly.
Egypt and Iran play out 1-1 draw. Egypt qualify 2nd. Iran eliminated. Salah and Taremi exchange goals.
Spain win Group H. Pedri winner. Uruguay eliminated — could not cope with Spain's pressing.
0-0 goalless draw. Cabo Verde qualify 2nd from Group H on goal difference over Saudi Arabia. Saudi Arabia eliminated.

SHOCK RESULT! Norway beat France 4-1 to top Group I. Haaland brace — now 6 goals in 3 group games. Erling is unstoppable. France still qualify 2nd with 6pts. This sets up an incredible knockout stage.
Senegal obliterate Iraq 5-0. Sarr brace. Senegal finish 3rd in Group I but qualify as one of the best 3rd-place teams. Iraq winless and exit.
Messi scores twice including a stunning long-range goal. Argentina win Group J with 9 points. Messi now has 6 goals in 3 group games — leading the Golden Boot race.
Wild 3-3 draw! Austria lead twice but Algeria fight back each time. Mahrez brace for Algeria — they finish 3rd with 2pts. Austria qualify 2nd in Group J with 4pts.
Both already qualified. Neither side takes risks. Colombia 1st (7pts, GD +5), Portugal 2nd (5pts, GD +3).
DR Congo qualify as a 3rd-place team (4pts). Manzambi brace — Johan Manzambi has 3 goals in the tournament. Uzbekistan eliminated winless.
England win Group L with 9pts. Dominant throughout. Kane leads England into knockouts.
Croatia beat Ghana 2-1 to finish 2nd. Ghana qualify as 3rd-place team (3pts). Modrić inspires Croatia.
DRAMATIC! Canada 1-0 South Africa. Stephen Eustaquio scores in the 95th minute to send Canada through. Stephen Eustaquio hero. Canada's first ever World Cup knockout stage win.
England 2-1 DR Congo. Full time.
Belgium 3-2 Senegal after extra time (AET).
USA 2-0 Bosnia-Herzegovina. Full time.

top_scorers.notes: Leading Golden Boot race. 2x goals vs Algeria (hat trick total), 1 vs Austria (MD2), 2 vs Jordan (MD3). Historic all-time WC scorer.
Tied Messi at 6 goals. 2 vs Iraq (MD1), 2 vs Senegal (MD2), 2 vs France (MD3). Norway sensationally top Group I.
4 goals incl. 1 vs Senegal, 1 vs Iraq (MD2), 1 vs Norway. Star performer despite France's MD3 loss.
4 goals, brilliant tournament. Key for France despite MD3 defeat.
3 group stage goals + key assists. Silky performances. Brazil's main threat.
4 goals incl. brace vs Iraq in MD3. One of the tournament's surprise stars.
3 goals, all vs different opponents. England's clinical leader.
Surprise star. 3 goals, brace vs Uzbekistan in MD3. Dark horse Golden Boot contender.
3 goals off the bench. Impact sub who saved Germany in MD2. Momentum dipped after MD3 loss.
3 goals, consistent throughout. Netherlands looking strong.
3 goals in 3 games. Excellent tournament from the Wolves striker.
Impact sub scorer. 2 goals off bench.
2 goals including brace in wild 3-3 draw with Austria. Algeria's bright spot.
2 goals, memorable chip vs Brazil in MD1. Morocco dark horse.
3 goals in group stage. USMNT hero despite MD3 loss to Turkey.

major_upsets: Spain 0-0 Cabo Verde (MD1) — holders held by minnows
Norway 4-1 France (MD3) — France humbled; Haaland masterclass
South Africa beat South Korea; Cabo Verde beat Uruguay
Canada 1-0 South Africa (R32 90+5') — Eustaquio late winner
storylines: Haaland unstoppable — 6 goals in 3 games; Norway top Group I
Messi chasing immortality — 6 goals equals Haaland; Argentina unbeaten
Germany upset by Ecuador despite 9-goal haul earlier
Spain unbeaten but conservative; Cabo Verde the fairy tale story of the group stage
Brazil solid but not spectacular; Vinicius electric when he turns it on
France stumble vs Norway but still second in Group I with Mbappe threats
